issues.description: TrashFromHand action missing 'optional: true' flag. Card text states 'You may trash', indicating this is optional.
Filter is incomplete. Should specify 'maxCount: 1' to match 'trash 1 card'. Current filter lacks quantity constraint.
Filter missing exclusion for [Monkey.D.Garp]. Card text explicitly excludes this character. Need 'excludeCardNames: ["Monkey.D.Garp"]' or similar.
PlayFromHand action missing 'optional: true' flag. Card text states 'Play up to 1', indicating optional play after successful trash.
Filter missing 'maxCount: 1' to match 'up to 1 blue {Navy} type Character card'.
